calendar.matters:
Petition For Court Supervision Of Conservatee'S Trust Estate,
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Debra Dolch. Daniel Bacon for and with Lil Wong.

The Parties informed the Court that the Conservatee had passed away on August 23, 2008 and requested the matter be taken off calendar. In addition, Ms. Ng requested the conservatorship matter on calendar for September 9, 2008 also be taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jackie Alameda Bailiff: Deputy M. Svahlin.

Petition For Court Supervision Of Conservatee'S Trust Estate,
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Continued To Aug-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
